testcase.name: loginTest

failure.message: java.io.FileNotFoundException: testdata/LoginData.xlsx (No such file or directory)

testcase.failure: java.lang.RuntimeException: java.io.FileNotFoundException: testdata/LoginData.xlsx (No such file or directory) at testdata/LoginData.xlsx (No such file or directory) at java.base/java.io.FileInputStream.open0(Native Method) at java.base/java.io.FileInputStream.open(FileInputStream.java:213) at testcase.name: runScenario["Verify accounts overview", "Accounts Overview"](1)
testcase.system-out: Scenario: Verify accounts overview # src/test/resources/features/accounts_overview.feature:3 Given user is logged into Parabank # stepdefinitions.LoginSteps.user_is_logged_into_parabank() When user navigates to Accounts Overview page # stepdefinitions.AccountsOverviewSteps.user_navigates_to_accounts_overview_page() Then user should see a list of all accounts with balances # stepdefinitions.AccountsOverviewSteps.user_should_see_a_list_of_all_accounts_with_balances()
testcase.system-err: [main] INFO io.github.bonigarcia.wdm.WebDriverManager - Using chromedriver 147.0.7727.56 (resolved driver for Chrome 147) [main] INFO io.github.bonigarcia.wdm.WebDriverManager - Exporting webdriver.chrome.driver as /Users/ranajitchowdhury/.cache/selenium/chromedriver/mac64/147.0.7727.56/chromedriver Apr 10, 2026 11:22:54 PM org.openqa.selenium.devtools.CdpVersionFinder findNearestMatch WARNING: Unable to find CDP implementation matching 147 Apr 10, 2026 11:22:54 PM org.openqa.selenium.chromium.ChromiumDriver lambda$new$5 WARNING: Unable to find version of CDP to use for 147.0.7727.55. You may need to include a dependency on a specific version of the CDP using something similar to `org.seleniumhq.selenium:selenium-devtools-v86:4.27.0` where the version ("v86") matches the version of the chromium-based browser you're using and the version number of the artifact is the same as Selenium's.

testcase.name: runScenario["Pay bill to a payee successfully", "Bill Payment"](2)
testcase.system-out: Scenario: Pay bill to a payee successfully # src/test/resources/features/bill_pay.feature:3 Given user is logged into Parabank # stepdefinitions.LoginSteps.user_is_logged_into_parabank() When user pays bill with following details # stepdefinitions.BillPaySteps.user_pays_bill(io.cucumber.datatable.DataTable) | payeeName | Electric Company | | address | New York | | city | New York | | state | NY | | zipCode | 10001 | | phone | 9999999999 | | account | 12345 | | verifyAcc | 12345 | | amount | 50 | Then bill payment should be successful # stepdefinitions.BillPaySteps.bill_payment_should_be_successful()
testcase.system-err: [main] INFO io.github.bonigarcia.wdm.WebDriverManager - Using chromedriver 147.0.7727.56 (resolved driver for Chrome 147) [main] INFO io.github.bonigarcia.wdm.WebDriverManager - Exporting webdriver.chrome.driver as /Users/ranajitchowdhury/.cache/selenium/chromedriver/mac64/147.0.7727.56/chromedriver Apr 10, 2026 11:23:04 PM org.openqa.selenium.devtools.CdpVersionFinder findNearestMatch WARNING: Unable to find CDP implementation matching 147 Apr 10, 2026 11:23:04 PM org.openqa.selenium.chromium.ChromiumDriver lambda$new$5 WARNING: Unable to find version of CDP to use for 147.0.7727.55. testcase.name: runScenario["Find transactions using date range filter", "Find Transactions"](3)
testcase.system-out: Scenario: Find transactions using date range filter # src/test/resources/features/find_transactions.feature:3 Given user is logged into Parabank # stepdefinitions.LoginSteps.user_is_logged_into_parabank() When user navigates to Find Transactions page # stepdefinitions.FindTransactionsSteps.user_navigates_to_find_transactions_page() And user enters date range from "01-01-2025" to "12-31-2025" # stepdefinitions.FindTransactionsSteps.user_enters_date_range(java.lang.String,java.lang.String) And user clicks the Find Transactions button for date range # stepdefinitions.FindTransactionsSteps.user_clicks_find() Then a table with transaction history should be displayed # stepdefinitions.FindTransactionsSteps.verify_table()
testcase.system-err: [main] INFO io.github.bonigarcia.wdm.WebDriverManager - Using chromedriver 147.0.7727.56 (resolved driver for Chrome 147) [main] INFO io.github.bonigarcia.wdm.WebDriverManager - Exporting webdriver.chrome.driver as /Users/ranajitchowdhury/.cache/selenium/chromedriver/mac64/147.0.7727.56/chromedriver Apr 10, 2026 11:23:20 PM org.openqa.selenium.devtools.CdpVersionFinder findNearestMatch WARNING: Unable to find CDP implementation matching 147 Apr 10, 2026 11:23:20 PM org.openqa.selenium.chromium.ChromiumDriver lambda$new$5 WARNING: Unable to find version of CDP to use for 147.0.7727.55. You may need to include a dependency on a specific version of the CDP using something similar to `org.seleniumhq.selenium:selenium-devtools-v86:4.27.0` where the version ("v86") matches the version of the chromium-based browser you're using and the version number of the artifact is the same as Selenium's.

testcase.name: runScenario["Transfer money between accounts", "Fund Transfer"](4)
testcase.system-out: Scenario: Transfer money between accounts # src/test/resources/features/fund_transfer.feature:3 Given user is logged into Parabank # stepdefinitions.LoginSteps.user_is_logged_into_parabank() When user navigates to Fund Transfer page # stepdefinitions.FundTransferSteps.navigate() And user transfers amount "500" from account "12345" to account "54321" # stepdefinitions.FundTransferSteps.performTransfer(java.lang.String,java.lang.String,java.lang.String) Then transfer should be successful # stepdefinitions.FundTransferSteps.verifyTransfer()
testcase.system-err: [main] INFO io.github.bonigarcia.wdm.WebDriverManager - Using chromedriver 147.0.7727.56 (resolved driver for Chrome 147) [main] INFO io.github.bonigarcia.wdm.WebDriverManager - Exporting webdriver.chrome.driver as /Users/ranajitchowdhury/.cache/selenium/chromedriver/mac64/147.0.7727.56/chromedriver Apr 10, 2026 11:23:31 PM org.openqa.selenium.devtools.CdpVersionFinder findNearestMatch WARNING: Unable to find CDP implementation matching 147 Apr 10, 2026 11:23:31 PM org.openqa.selenium.chromium.ChromiumDriver lambda$new$5 WARNING: Unable to find version of CDP to use for 147.0.7727.55. You may need to include a dependency on a specific version of the CDP using something similar to `org.seleniumhq.selenium:selenium-devtools-v86:4.27.0` where the version ("v86") matches the version of the chromium-based browser you're using and the version number of the artifact is the same as Selenium's.

testcase.name: runScenario["Successful login with valid credentials", "Banking Login"](5)
testcase.system-out: Scenario: Successful login with valid credentials # src/test/resources/features/login.feature:3 Given user is on Parabank login page # stepdefinitions.LoginSteps.user_is_on_parabank_login_page() When user enters username "john" # stepdefinitions.LoginSteps.user_enters_username(java.lang.String) And user enters password "demo" # stepdefinitions.LoginSteps.user_enters_password(java.lang.String) And user clicks login # stepdefinitions.LoginSteps.user_clicks_login() Then user should be logged in successfully # stepdefinitions.LoginSteps.user_should_be_logged_in_successfully()
testcase.system-err: [main] INFO io.github.bonigarcia.wdm.WebDriverManager - Using chromedriver 147.0.7727.56 (resolved driver for Chrome 147) [main] INFO io.github.bonigarcia.wdm.WebDriverManager - Exporting webdriver.chrome.driver as /Users/ranajitchowdhury/.cache/selenium/chromedriver/mac64/147.0.7727.56/chromedriver Apr 10, 2026 11:23:43 PM org.openqa.selenium.devtools.CdpVersionFinder findNearestMatch WARNING: Unable to find CDP implementation matching 147 Apr 10, 2026 11:23:43 PM org.openqa.selenium.chromium.ChromiumDriver lambda$new$5 WARNING: Unable to find version of CDP to use for 147.0.7727.55. You may need to include a dependency on a specific version of the CDP using something similar to `org.seleniumhq.selenium:selenium-devtools-v86:4.27.0` where the version ("v86") matches the version of the chromium-based browser you're using and the version number of the artifact is the same as Selenium's.

testcase.name: runScenario["User logs out successfully", "Logout"](6)
testcase.system-out: Scenario: User logs out successfully # src/test/resources/features/logout.feature:3 Given user is logged into Parabank # stepdefinitions.LoginSteps.user_is_logged_into_parabank() When user clicks logout # stepdefinitions.LogoutSteps.user_clicks_logout() Then user should be logged out successfully # stepdefinitions.LogoutSteps.user_should_be_logged_out_successfully()

testcase.name: runScenario["User opens a new account", "Open New Account"](7)
testcase.system-out: Scenario: User opens a new account # src/test/resources/features/open_new_account.feature:3 Given user is logged into Parabank # stepdefinitions.LoginSteps.user_is_logged_into_parabank() When user navigates to Open New Account page # stepdefinitions.OpenNewAccountSteps.user_navigates_to_open_new_account_page() And user selects account type "SAVINGS" and existing account "12345" # stepdefinitions.OpenNewAccountSteps.user_selects_account_type_and_existing_account(java.lang.String,java.lang.String) And user clicks Open New Account # stepdefinitions.OpenNewAccountSteps.user_clicks_open_new_account() Then new account should be created successfully # stepdefinitions.OpenNewAccountSteps.new_account_should_be_created_successfully()
testcase.system-err: [main] INFO io.github.bonigarcia.wdm.WebDriverManager - Using chromedriver 147.0.7727.56 (resolved driver for Chrome 147) [main] INFO io.github.bonigarcia.wdm.WebDriverManager - Exporting webdriver.chrome.driver as /Users/ranajitchowdhury/.cache/selenium/chromedriver/mac64/147.0.7727.56/chromedriver Apr 10, 2026 11:24:05 PM org.openqa.selenium.devtools.CdpVersionFinder findNearestMatch WARNING: Unable to find CDP implementation matching 147 Apr 10, 2026 11:24:05 PM org.openqa.selenium.chromium.ChromiumDriver lambda$new$5 WARNING: Unable to find version of CDP to use for 147.0.7727.55. You may need to include a dependency on a specific version of the CDP using something similar to `org.seleniumhq.selenium:selenium-devtools-v86:4.27.0` where the version ("v86") matches the version of the chromium-based browser you're using and the version number of the artifact is the same as Selenium's.

testcase.name: runScenario["User requests a loan", "Request Loan"](8)
testcase.system-out: Scenario: User requests a loan # src/test/resources/features/request_loan.feature:3 Given user is logged into Parabank # stepdefinitions.LoginSteps.user_is_logged_into_parabank() When user navigates to Request Loan page # stepdefinitions.RequestLoanSteps.user_navigates_to_request_loan_page() And user enters loan amount "5000" and down payment "500" # stepdefinitions.RequestLoanSteps.user_enters_loan_amount_and_down_payment(java.lang.String,java.lang.String) And user clicks Apply Now # stepdefinitions.RequestLoanSteps.user_clicks_apply_now() Then loan request should be approved # stepdefinitions.RequestLoanSteps.loan_request_should_be_approved()
testcase.system-err: [main] INFO io.github.bonigarcia.wdm.WebDriverManager - Using chromedriver 147.0.7727.56 (resolved driver for Chrome 147) [main] INFO io.github.bonigarcia.wdm.WebDriverManager - Exporting webdriver.chrome.driver as /Users/ranajitchowdhury/.cache/selenium/chromedriver/mac64/147.0.7727.56/chromedriver Apr 10, 2026 11:24:17 PM org.openqa.selenium.devtools.CdpVersionFinder findNearestMatch WARNING: Unable to find CDP implementation matching 147 Apr 10, 2026 11:24:17 PM org.openqa.selenium.chromium.ChromiumDriver lambda$new$5 WARNING: Unable to find version of CDP to use for 147.0.7727.55. You may need to include a dependency on a specific version of the CDP using something similar to `org.seleniumhq.selenium:selenium-devtools-v86:4.27.0` where the version ("v86") matches the version of the chromium-based browser you're using and the version number of the artifact is the same as Selenium's.

testcase.name: runScenario["Update user contact information", "Update Contact Info"](9)
testcase.system-out: Scenario: Update user contact information # src/test/resources/features/update_contact_info.feature:3 Given user is logged into Parabank # stepdefinitions.LoginSteps.user_is_logged_into_parabank() When user navigates to Update Contact Info page # stepdefinitions.UpdateContactInfoSteps.user_navigates_to_update_contact_info_page() And user updates contact info with: # stepdefinitions.UpdateContactInfoSteps.user_updates_contact_info_with(io.cucumber.datatable.DataTable) | firstName | John | | lastName | Doe | | address | 123 St | | city | NY | | state | NY | | zipCode | 10001 | | phone | 1234567890 | And user clicks Update # stepdefinitions.UpdateContactInfoSteps.user_clicks_update() Then contact info should be updated successfully # stepdefinitions.UpdateContactInfoSteps.contact_info_should_be_updated_successfully()
testcase.system-err: [main] INFO io.github.bonigarcia.wdm.WebDriverManager - Using chromedriver 147.0.7727.56 (resolved driver for Chrome 147) [main] INFO io.github.bonigarcia.wdm.WebDriverManager - Exporting webdriver.chrome.driver as /Users/ranajitchowdhury/.cache/selenium/chromedriver/mac64/147.0.7727.56/chromedriver Apr 10, 2026 11:24:28 PM org.openqa.selenium.devtools.CdpVersionFinder findNearestMatch WARNING: Unable to find CDP implementation matching 147 Apr 10, 2026 11:24:28 PM org.openqa.selenium.chromium.ChromiumDriver lambda$new$5 WARNING: Unable to find version of CDP to use for 147.0.7727.55. You may need to include a dependency on a specific version of the CDP using something similar to `org.seleniumhq.selenium:selenium-devtools-v86:4.27.0` where the version ("v86") matches the version of the chromium-based browser you're using and the version number of the artifact is the same as Selenium's.
